prompt: Create a settings page with a heading that says 'Settings'. Below the heading, display two cards side by side in a row. The first card should have a header titled 'Profile' and a body containing two text fields: one labeled 'Name' with placeholder 'Jane Doe', and one labeled 'Email' with placeholder 'jane@example.com'. The second card should have a header titled 'Preferences' and a body containing a select dropdown labeled 'Theme' with three options: Light, Dark, and System. At the bottom, add a row with a ghost Cancel button and a primary Save button, right-aligned.
reference:
import { Text } from '@tale-ui/react/text';
import { Row } from '@tale-ui/react/row';
import { Card } from '@tale-ui/react/card';
import { TextField } from '@tale-ui/react/text-field';
import { Select } from '@tale-ui/react/select';
import { Button } from '@tale-ui/react/button';
import { Column } from '@tale-ui/react/column';

export function SettingsPage() {
  return (
    <Column gap="l">
      <Text variant="heading" size="m">Settings</Text>
      <Row gap="l" align="start">
        <Card.Root>
          <Card.Header>
            <Text variant="title" size="m">Profile</Text>
          </Card.Header>
          <Card.Body>
            <Column gap="m">
              <TextField.Root>
                <TextField.Label>Name</TextField.Label>
                <TextField.Input placeholder="Jane Doe" />
              </TextField.Root>
              <TextField.Root>
                <TextField.Label>Email</TextField.Label>
                <TextField.Input placeholder="jane@example.com" />
              </TextField.Root>
            </Column>
          </Card.Body>
        </Card.Root>
        <Card.Root>
          <Card.Header>
            <Text variant="title" size="m">Preferences</Text>
          </Card.Header>
          <Card.Body>
            <Select.Root placeholder="Select theme...">
              <Select.Label>Theme</Select.Label>
              <Select.Trigger>
                <Select.Value />
                <Select.Icon />
              </Select.Trigger>
              <Select.Popover>
                <Select.ListBox>
                  <Select.Item id="light" textValue="Light">Light</Select.Item>
                  <Select.Item id="dark" textValue="Dark">Dark</Select.Item>
                  <Select.Item id="system" textValue="System">System</Select.Item>
                </Select.ListBox>
              </Select.Popover>
            </Select.Root>
          </Card.Body>
        </Card.Root>
      </Row>
      <Row gap="m" justify="end">
        <Button variant="ghost">Cancel</Button>
        <Button variant="primary">Save</Button>
      </Row>
    </Column>
  );
}
